notes: Phase 4 (Icecrown Citadel 25 Heroic + The Ruby Sanctum) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins WotLK Classic Fire Mage gear guide (anchor phase-5-tier-10; a second Frostfire-hybrid variant table also exists on the page, not used here). Tier set: Sanctified Bloodmage line — this spec uses the non-tier Robe of the Waking Nightmare instead of the tier chest, but keeps tier hands (unlike Arcane). Enchants/gems shared by all three mage specs; item-specific gem suggestions from the source page are omitted here in favor of the general spec gem profile.

gems.name: Chaotic Skyflare Diamond (+40 crit, +3% crit damage — requires two blue/purple/green gems)
Runed Cardinal Ruby (+23 spellpower) — or Runed Scarlet Ruby (rare); Runed Dragon's Eye/Stormjewel for jewelcrafters
Reckless Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 haste) — or Veiled Ametrine (+16 spellpower / +10 hit) if hit-capped
Purified Dreadstone (+10 spellpower / +10 spirit) — or Purified Twilight Opal (rare)
